name: evomate-claude-code-sidecar-template
description: Template: add EvoMate as a non-blocking observer around Claude Code hook events. Adapt hook names to the installed Claude Code version.

events.command: npm --silent run evomate:observe -- --source claude-code --event user_prompt_submit || true
npm --silent run evomate:advisor -- --source claude-code --event pre_tool_use --text || true
npm --silent run evomate:outcome -- --source claude-code --event stop --outcome success || true
